rationale: This is a classic Bus Jam / parking-puzzle fail hook — visually and mechanically it has nothing to do with Solitaire's green felt + playing cards aesthetic, and the "blocked vehicle" fail beat doesn't translate to drawing/stacking cards. Casual puzzle audiences do overlap somewhat, but adapting this archetype would require a full creative rebuild (e.g., a "wrong card move blocks foundation" fail), at which point it's no longer this cluster. Recommend skipping unless the team specifically wants to test a hybrid fail-hook variant authored from scratch around card-stacking dead-ends.
